title: Update lichen-gateway to use RplStack for root instead of bare RplNode
description: Update only the file lichen-gateway/src/gateway.rs to use RplStack for the root instead of bare RplNode. Integrate durable storage using MemStorage for tests, admission policy, and single-owner runtime pattern from RplStack. Update all methods to use the stack's API. Update tests. Ensure tests pass. Do not edit any other files.
